package rulecoverage

func PositiveDomainConstantsDeclaredInHandlerPackage() string {
    ruleID := "domain_constants_declared_in_handler_package"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Domain enums, statuses, and lifecycle constants that live in handler packages instead of domain-facing packages."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
